Business: Shree Ram Proteins Limited engages in cotton seeds extraction business in India. Its products include cotton linter, seed hull, seed meal, seed wash oil, and seed refine oil; and soyabean meal, rapeseed meal, groundnut meal, and raw cotton bales.   Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)

  Current: 16.59  (+0.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
